---
title: The Tropospheric Jet Response to Prescribed Zonal Forcing in an Idealized Atmospheric
  Model
pagetitle: 2008-7-1-Chen2008b - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2008
author: Gang Chen and Pablo Zurita-Gotor
venue: Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences
venue_cit: <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 65, 2254--2271, doi:10.1175/2007JAS2589.1.
recommended_citation: 'Gang Chen and Pablo Zurita-Gotor, 2008: The Tropospheric Jet
  Response to Prescribed Zonal Forcing in an Idealized Atmospheric Model, <i>Journal
  of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 65, 2254--2271, doi:10.1175/2007JAS2589.1.'
paper_url: http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/2007JAS2589.1
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# The Tropospheric Jet Response to Prescribed Zonal Forcing in an Idealized Atmospheric Model

*Published in Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences, 2008*

**Recommended citation:** Gang Chen and Pablo Zurita-Gotor, 2008: The Tropospheric Jet Response to Prescribed Zonal Forcing in an Idealized Atmospheric Model, <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 65, 2254--2271, doi:10.1175/2007JAS2589.1.

[Download paper](http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/2007JAS2589.1){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
